description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 4 threat-and-hardening cluster. Pins secrets/identity remediation apart from single app controls, threat modeling, and diff review.

cases.prompt: Move our hardcoded credentials into a secret manager, classify which env vars are safe for the client, and set up rotation.
cases.reason: Broad secrets/identity remediation across storage, classification, and rotation — a side-effecting hardening task.

cases.prompt: Add a parameterized query to fix this one SQL injection.
cases.reason: One decided app-layer control, not secrets/identity posture.

cases.prompt: What could go wrong with how we handle auth tokens and API keys? Enumerate the risks.
cases.reason: Enumerating risks is design-time threat modeling; hardening remediates a decided problem.

cases.prompt: Review this PR and tell me if it leaks any secrets — don't change anything.
cases.reason: Review-only of a diff is security-pr-reviewer; hardening is the remediation, not the review.
